name: Create and edit custom page -- @1.2
fullName: Custom page create/edit/delete: Create and edit custom page

steps.name: Given user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
When the user gets to the custom page
And user "edit" a page with title "test custom page" slug "testCP" state "published" visibility "logged-in-user" and code "<html> hello world</html>"
Then user verify page with "edit" title "test custom page"
